summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Story Generator specific round layouts - all backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), all three required presentation layouts validated and video generation confirmed working
passed_tests: All specific test presentations found and accessible:
- b1b7943a-1fb9-4304-94c9-612636b161b1 (5-round layout: MC + 1 REG + 1 MISC + Mystery + BIG)
- 6de0675c-7499-439f-a4c9-a7139414151f (6-round layout with 2 REGs: MC + 2 REG + 1 MISC + Mystery + BIG)
- 4b0a74a5-0bc5-4188-9e4e-b4dbfe38eb32 (Denver presentation with 2 MISCs: MC + 1 REG + 2 MISC + Mystery + BIG)
Round layout validation passed for all three presentation types
Round names correctly appear on colored boxes (REG, MISC, BIG rounds show custom names)
POST /api/story-generator/generate/{id} creates MP4 successfully for all layouts
Generated videos can be downloaded (proper MP4 content-type, ~367KB file size)
GET /api/story-generator/presentation/{id} returns detailed info for all test presentations
POST /api/story-generator/preview/{id} generates preview successfully for all layouts
Video generation workflow completes end-to-end for all three layout types
All API endpoints responding with correct status codes and data structures
